FAB Mobile puts the power of the bank in your hands

Spend, save and stay on top of your everyday transactions, from just about anywhere.

  • New! Get financial confidence in one tap

    Track, plan and stay in control with smart transactions, personalised insights and real-time alerts - all designed to make your banking smarter!

  • New! Smart transactions are here.

    Now you can view your transactions with logos, categories and smart filters for clearer money management.

  • Manage your account, debit & credit cards

    Check your balances, make payments on time and stay on track.

  • Sign up for a product instantly on FAB mobile

    Get an account or credit card with just your Emirates ID.

Explore FAB Mobile

Stay secure and manage finances efficiently with FAB

Beware of fake investment opportunities advertised on social media claiming to be from FAB.

FAB does not promote investments through social media or third-party ads. Always verify any advertisement through our official communication/information channels.

Fraud and Security

At FAB, protecting our customers from fraud is a key priority.

Debt Management

FAB supports customers to repay their debt and provides alternate solutions.

Need more help? Get in touch.

Contact us anytime for further assistance or check out our FAQ page for more information.
